• Multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated underground worlds.
  • Features building, crafting, trading, and admin controls.
  • Includes local storage, cloud sync, and cross-platform support.
  • Uses MQTT for real-time networking and IndexedDB for save data.
  • Custom UI with bevel borders, responsive design, and touch controls.
    const GameEngine = new GameEngine();
    const Network = new NetworkManager();
    const SaveSystem = new SaveSystem();

Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game featuring procedurally generated worlds, real-time networking via MQTT, and comprehensive save systems with cloud sync. Players explore, mine resources, build structures, and trade with others while managing fuel, hull integrity, and inventory. The game includes admin controls, responsive mobile support, and a custom UI with bevel borders and smooth animations.
